What we bring

Everything the party needs to sound right.

Mix and match gear, or let us put together a full setup — we'll size it to your space and your guest count.

🔊

Speakers & PA systems

From backyard-sized to full hall coverage, sized to your guest count and space.

🎤

Wired & wireless mics

For toasts, speeches, DJs, or a surprise karaoke round later in the night.

🎚️

Mixers & lighting

Blend music and mic input cleanly, with optional uplighting to match the mood.

🚚

Delivery, setup & pickup

We drop it off, wire it up, and test it before your first guest arrives.

Packages

Pick your setup, or tell us your event size.

Every package includes a sound check before you take over. Add a lavalier mic, a projector, or dance floor lights to any option.

Booking flow

From request to ready in four steps.

01

Tell us the date

Share your event date, location, and rough guest count.

02

Pick a package

We'll recommend a setup, or you build your own from the gear list.

03

We deliver & test

Setup and a full sound check happen before your first guest arrives.

04

You run the party

We handle pickup after — you just plug in and play.
